content: img src    Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics videos, collected by your friends at   span  em IEEE Spectrum  em  span  robotics. We also post a weekly calendar of upcoming robotics events. Please   span  a   us your events  a  span  for inclusion.  span   p  h5  a href    2026  a   1 5 June 2026, VIENNA  h5  p Enjoy today s videos!  p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  div style  page-break-after  always   span style  display none     span   div  p class  rm-anchors  id  ttju8lqntju  Happy Holidays from FZI Living Lab!  p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  1961rb0n7gu  Happy Holidays from the Learning Systems and Robotics Lab!  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  cd01616c ec85b916855012  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Systems and Robotics Lab  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  pbtdswgidby  Happy Holidays from Toyota Research Institute!  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  147f7af6f709e5de26c5aa89b19fc0f8  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Research Institute  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  f24vyrpbtbc  Happy Holidays from Clearpath Robotics!  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  1201b48a71d140c7134a96dba953a1bb  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Robotics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  ywfiskhi2ms  Happy AI Holidays from Robotnik!  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  07bf879b266cec3463606c1c0d18a20b  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  4schh8sjje0  Happy AI Holidays from ABB Robotics!  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  d5f90ee86b13e602f49b64e8b50bdb8c  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Robotics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  ut3qfpr7hyo   em With its unique modular configuration, TRON 2 lets you freely configure dual-arm, bipedal, or wheeled setups to fit your mission.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  e1ed9daadf7a93021e7b6e893d8f956f  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Dynamics  a     p  p Thanks, Jinyan!  p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  a2bmv1oycqa  I love this robot, but can someone please explain why what happens at 2 00 makes me physically uncomfortable?  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  7cbeb6f91b570135c57680513cd1aaa0  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  p Thanks, Ayato!  p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  f3r4a-yzrdc   em This robot, REWW-ARM, is a remote wire-driven mobile robot that separates and excludes electronics from the mobile part, so that the mobile robot can operate in harsh environments. A novel transmission mechanism enables efficient and long-distance electronics-free power transmission, closed-loop control that estimates the distal state from wire. It demonstrated locomotion and manipulation on land and underwater.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  b1855035cf8cabb8ee24b20bb114c6ba  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Lab  a     p  p Thanks, Takahiro!  p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  jlfcggsz11g   em DEEP Robotics has deployed China s first  a data-linked-post     href    target  _blank  robot dog patrol team for forest fire protection  a  in the West Lake area. Powered by embodied AI, these quadruped robots support early detection, patrol, and risk monitoring using technology to protect nature and strengthen emergency response.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  b3306fca6b9dd1fa8d8803f0e8541f44  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Robotics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  tqm-a6mez1s   em In this video we show how we trained our robot to fold a towel from start to finish. Folding a towel might seem simple, but for a robot it means solving perception, planning, and dexterous manipulation all at once, especially when dealing with soft, deformable fabric. We walk through how the system sees the towel, identifies key features, and executes each fold autonomously.   em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  c9c7bf421ffde89e1a350195d31e0fc0  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Robotics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  aehnxtbec_e  This may be the first humanoid app store, but it s far from the first app store for robots. Problem is, for an app store to gain traction, there needs to be a platform out there that people will buy for its core functionality first.  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  c3c5114b8bb760b1119572e8a71529f8  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  p class  rm-anchors  id  3w2rbpbeiba  You can tell that this isn t U.S. government funded research because it involves  a data-linked-post     href    target  _blank  a robot fetching drinks  a .  p  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  827a918b280e85b5afb969b0c56469d1  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  nnaaylkvdtk   em This video shows the Perseverance Mars Rover s point of view during a record-breaking drive that occurred June 19, 2025, the 1,540th Martian day, or sol, of the mission. The  a data-linked-post     href    target  _blank  Perseverance rover  a  was traveling northbound and covered 1,350.7 feet  411.7 meters  on that sol, over the course of about 4 hours and 24 minutes. This distance eclipsed its previous record of distance traveled in a single sol  1,140.7 feet  347.7 meters , which was achieved on April 3, 2023  Sol 753 .   em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  8c9c64fed1d8aeb032b9c73c789b7f21  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  8mnhn8b4tau   em Automation is what s helped keep lock maker Wilson Bohannan based in America for more than 150 years while all of its competitors relocated overseas. Using two high-speed and high-precision FANUC M-10 series robots, Acme developed a simple but highly sophisticated system that uses innovative end-of-arm tooling to accommodate 18 different styles of padlocks. As a result of Acme s new system using FANUC robots, Wilson Bohannan production rocketed from 1,500-1,800 locks finished per eight-hour shift to more than 5,000.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  60910a8104d514ccb69a90e3a25b744d  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href       p  div class  horizontal-rule    div  blockquote class  rm-anchors  id  srz9e48b6am   em In this conversation, Zack Jackowski, general manager and vice president, Atlas, and Alberto Rodriguez, director of robot behavior, sit down to discuss the path to generalist humanoid robots working at scale and how we approach research   development to both push the boundaries of the industry and deliver valuable applications.  em   blockquote  p class  shortcode-media shortcode-media-youtube   span class  rm-shortcode  data-rm-shortcode-id  b64ae4213eeb602902029d37b9bd9d87  style  display block position relative padding-top 56.25     iframe frameborder  0  height  auto  lazy-loadable  true  scrolling  no  src    style  position absolute top 0 left 0 width 100  height 100    width  100     iframe   span   p  p    a href    Dynamics  a     p  div class  horizontal-rule    div
